message:
feat(robot): graceful unimplemented feature handling (R4)

Implement bead ntm-tdiy: Add consistent handling for unimplemented
robot features with exit code 2 instead of exit code 1.

Changes:
- Add NotImplementedResponse type with feature and planned_version
- Update PrintRobotUnavailable signature to include all required fields
- Update --robot-assign to use PrintRobotUnavailable with proper JSON
- Add tests for NotImplementedResponse structure
- Document exit code semantics in AGENTS.md

Exit code semantics:
| Code | Meaning     | Agent Action                  |
|------|-------------|-------------------------------|
| 0    | Success     | Proceed with response data    |
| 1    | Error       | Handle error, maybe retry     |
| 2    | Unavailable | Skip gracefully, log for info |

Example response for unimplemented feature:
{
  "success": false,
  "error_code": "NOT_IMPLEMENTED",
  "error": "Work assignment is planned for a future release",
  "feature": "robot-assign",
  "planned_version": "v1.3",
  "hint": "Use 'ntm --robot-plan' with 'bd ready' to manually assign"
}

This allows AI agents to distinguish between:
- Actual errors (exit 1) - should handle/retry
- Unavailable features (exit 2) - skip gracefully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -219,6 +219,37 @@ Use `bv` instead of rolling your own dependency graph logic.
 
 ---
 
+### Robot Command Exit Codes
+
+All `--robot-*` commands follow a consistent exit code convention:
+
+| Exit Code | Meaning | JSON Response | Agent Action |
+|-----------|---------|---------------|--------------|
+| 0 | Success | `{"success": true, ...}` | Proceed with response data |
+| 1 | Error | `{"success": false, "error_code": "...", ...}` | Handle error, maybe retry |
+| 2 | Unavailable | `{"success": false, "error_code": "NOT_IMPLEMENTED", ...}` | Skip gracefully, log for awareness |
+
+Example handling:
+
+```python
+result = subprocess.run(["ntm", "--robot-tail=myproj"], capture_output=True)
+data = json.loads(result.stdout)
+
+if result.returncode == 0:
+    # Success - process response
+    process_agents(data["panes"])
+elif result.returncode == 2:
+    # Unavailable - feature not implemented yet
+    logging.info(f"Feature {data.get('feature')} not available")
+else:  # returncode == 1
+    # Error - handle or propagate
+    raise RuntimeError(f"{data['error_code']}: {data['error']}")
+```
+
+Common error codes: `SESSION_NOT_FOUND`, `PANE_NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_FLAG`, `TIMEOUT`, `INTERNAL_ERROR`, `NOT_IMPLEMENTED`.
+
+---
+
